Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The expected order is generally sequential Post Screen Interview Decide Onboard Payroll Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means both Decide and Interview come after Screen but there is no edge between Interview and Decide

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means after Screen both Decide and Interview can happen parallel or either order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomaly in Model 1 The decision Make Hiring Decision happens before or in parallel with interviews Conduct Interviews This is a major anomaly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So the anomaly is Interview and Decide are not ordered correctly In a normative process Interview must happen before Decide

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Interview does not lead to any other activity and does not block anything else

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means you could onboard someone before interviewing them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model 2 Post leads to Screen and Interview and Interview leads to Decide

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Screening and Interview ordering means Interview can happen before Screening or in parallel So allowing Interview before Screen is an anomaly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The xor payroll means either execute Payroll or skip it

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the model allows closing a case without adding the employee to payroll This is a severe anomaly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The loop on onboarding allows repetition This might represent rework so this might be acceptable or realistic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 violates the fundamental causal chain Interview must precede Decision which must precede Onboarding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 preserves Interview Decide Onboard but allows skipping Payroll and allows Screen to be out of order

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 is less wrong because it maintains that interviews inform the decision and maintains that the decision precedes onboarding

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore I conclude Model 2 is better but both have significant anomalies

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model 2 preserves the critical path Interview Decide Onboard which is the core of the hiring workflow whereas Model 1 breaks this causal chain
